description:
Saves a machine learning model as part of a batch job.

The model will be accompanied by a separate STAC Item that implements the [mlm-model extension](https://github.com/stac-extensions/mlm).

Set ``return_model`` to ``true`` when ``save_ml_model`` is followed by processes such as ``ml_predict()`` in the same process graph. The default (``false``) returns a boolean success flag, which is appropriate when saving is the job result.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The machine learning model to store.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A distinct name of the model.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Additional parameters to create the file(s).

parameters.name: return_model
parameters.description: If ``true``, return the input model after a successful save so it can be chained (for example with ``ml_predict()``) in the same process graph. If ``false`` (default), return ``true`` on success or ``false`` on failure.

returns.description: If ``return_model`` is ``false`` (default), returns ``true`` on success or ``false`` on failure. If ``return_model`` is ``true``, returns the saved ml-model on success.
